connections.def: diminutive from the same as 2339; a dangerous animal:--(venomous, wild) beast. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, quick, raw, running, springing, troop.

connections.def: neuter of a derivative of 2198; a live thing, i.e. an animal:--beast. see GREEK for
